enemy.name: hatred
discovery_dialogue: Bad blood between $suspect and $victim. Deep-rooted, by the looks of it.

neighbor.name: property_dispute
discovery_dialogue: $suspect and $victim had been fighting over land. For years, apparently.
A property dispute. Petty on the surface. Deadly underneath.

friend.name: argument
discovery_dialogue: Looks like $suspect and $victim weren't on speaking terms. Wonder what set them off.
Something came between them. Friends one day, strangers the next.

friend.name: betrayal
discovery_dialogue: $suspect felt betrayed by $victim. That kind of wound doesn't close easy.
Trust, broken. By $victim, no less. $suspect wouldn't forget that.

romance_unrequited.name: jealousy
discovery_dialogue: $suspect wanted something from $victim they were never going to get.
Unrequited love. The worst kind of feeling to sit with.

romance.name: argument
discovery_dialogue: $suspect and $victim had been fighting. Badly, from what I can tell.

romance.name: betrayal
discovery_dialogue: $victim did something unforgivable. And $suspect found out.
Betrayed by the one person you trusted most. That'll do something to you.

romance.name: jealousy
discovery_dialogue: $suspect couldn't let go. Even when $victim had moved on.
Green-eyed and dangerous. $suspect was watching $victim closely.

romance.name: crime_of_passion
discovery_dialogue: Whatever happened between them...it wasn't planned. It was felt.
So $suspect snapped. Heat of the moment. That's the only explanation.
